title: panicum genuflexum
intro: Panicum genuflexum, also known as the bent grass or knee bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Panicum genuflexum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and its extracts have been used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Panicum genuflexum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
